business_ideas.idea: DeSo (Diesel) blockchain: blockchain infrastructure optimized for decentralized social networks
Bitcloud: prototype social app on DeSo blockchain with profile coins and open content database
Diamond App: improved social app built on DeSo with better UX than Bitcloud
Polygram: NFT marketplace app built on DeSo blockchain for creator royalties
Creator coins: coins attached to user profiles enabling fan ownership and cash flow sharing

predictions.text: Decentralized social media is asymmetrically favored to win; open content enables faster iteration than centralized platforms
Only 5% chance this works, but multi-trillion dollar opportunity if successful
Native apps will be built in non-US countries tailored to local users, bypassing Silicon Valley monopoly
Cash flows from NFTs and creator monetization will compound, making creator coins valuable long-term holdings
$80M already invested in creator coins on DeSo, showing real market demand
